# WV Construction

> WV Construction is a local building and property maintenance contractor for homeowners, landlords and letting agents across Wirral and Liverpool, covering CH and L postcodes only.

## Trading / legal
WV Construction is a trading name of ACOR Building & Property Solutions Ltd, registered in England and Wales (company number 09287377). The previously registered "W V Construction Ltd" is dissolved and is not the active business. Registered office, insurance status and contact details are being verified before launch.

## Services
- Residential extensions (working from your drawings)
- Renovations & refurbishments
- Property maintenance
- Landlord maintenance
- Void property refurbishments
- General building works
- Builder quote from existing drawings

## Service area
CH and L postcodes only (Wirral and Liverpool — e.g. Wallasey, Birkenhead, Heswall, West Kirby, and parts of Liverpool).

## Important pages
- Home: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/
- Services: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/services/
- Visualiser: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/visualiser/
- Already have drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/already-have-drawings/
- Builder quote from drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/builder-quote-from-drawings/
- Landlords: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/landlords/
- Reviews: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/reviews/
- Areas: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/areas/
- Contact: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/contact/

## Resources (guides)
Search-led guides connecting the building journey: idea → visual concept → drawings → builder-ready pack → quote. TailoredQuote and SC Design Wirral are independent external services referenced as useful resources only — WV Construction is not in partnership with them, and SC Design Wirral is an architectural design and drawing service (not an architect/architectural practice).
- Resources hub: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/
- Send photos for a quote: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/send-photos/

TailoredQuote guides (visual quote tools, for builders/trades):
- Overview: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/
- AI quote software for builders: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/ai-quote-software-for-builders/
- Website visualisers for builders: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/website-visualiser-for-builders/
- AI mockups for trade quotes: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/ai-mockups-for-trade-quotes/
- Digital quote approval for trades: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/digital-quote-approval-for-trades/
- Branded PDF quotes for builders: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/branded-pdf-quotes-for-builders/
- Quote software vs Word, Excel and WhatsApp: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/quote-software-vs-word-excel-whatsapp/
- From customer photos to quote-ready enquiries: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/tailoredquote/customer-photos-to-quote-ready-enquiries/

SC Design Wirral guides (drawings & design, for homeowners):
- Overview: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/
- Extension drawings in Wirral: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/extension-drawings-wirral/
- Planning vs building-regulations drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/planning-vs-building-regulations-drawings/
- Builder quotation packs: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/builder-quotation-packs/
- Already have drawings? Next steps: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/already-have-drawings-next-steps/
- From visualiser concept to drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/visualiser-concept-to-drawings/
- Loft & garage conversion drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/loft-garage-conversion-drawings/
- Measured surveys & existing drawings: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/measured-surveys-existing-drawings/
- Permitted development & lawful development certificates: https://wvconstructionwirral.co.uk/resources/sc-design-wirral/permitted-development-lawful-development-certificate/

## Visualiser
The Extension & Refurbishment Visualiser lets people upload a photo and describe an idea. Output is concept/inspiration only — it is NOT a quote, fixed price, architectural drawing, planning advice, structural design, building-regulations information, or confirmation that an idea is buildable or approvable. Visualised images are powered by TailoredQuote.co.uk (https://tailoredquote.co.uk/).

## Reviews
WV Construction has historic MyBuilder review proof under its WV Construction trading profile (5/5 from 13 reviews; reviews are historic, around 2010–2014). Source: https://www.mybuilder.com/profile/wvatc61/reviews?page=1 — rating and count to be verified before launch.
